seoTitle: Coquette Point vs Coral Sea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coquette Point and Coral Sea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coquette Point vs Coral Sea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coquette Point and Coral Sea.
heading: Coquette Point vs Coral Sea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coquette Point, Queensland and Coral Sea, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coquette Point has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Coral Sea (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coquette Point or Coral Sea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coquette Point has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Coral Sea scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coquette Point scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Coral Sea scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coquette Point or Coral Sea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coquette Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
